title: Resolution Approving and Adopting the Municipal Development Council (MDC) 2021-01 Dated March 10, 2021 Entitled : Resolution Reprogramming and Approving the Projects Under the 20% Municipal Development Fund Cy 2020 Amounting to Sixty-three Million Five Hundred Nine Thousand Fifty-seven Pesos and 50/100 (php63,509,057.50) As Continuing Appropriations for Cy 2021. (AUTHOR: HON. GERONIMO A. CICERON, 03/22/2021)
